details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest small van studio move after 10:00
Task 2: Select package with packing/unpacking under £900
Task 3: Office move 10–15 employees, weekend morning with IT handling
Task 4: Order rated packing materials under £80
Task 5: 1-bedroom move into storage with cheapest 50+ sq ft unit within 10 miles
Task 6: Schedule 30-minute video survey next Wednesday morning
Task 7: Apply best weekday promotion to Wednesday home move quote
Task 8: Create and save custom moving checklist
Task 9: Choose cheaper between hourly and fixed-price for 4-hour 1-bed local move
